description.ko: 진동이 견고한 기하학적 빛으로 변하여 공허 속에 일시적인 공명의 건축물을 만들어내는 소리의 시각화.
description.en: A visualization of sound where vibrations transform into solid geometric light, creating a temporary architecture of resonance in the void.

prompt: A cinematic 3D visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Harmonic Monolith.' A central floating geometric core of liquid silver vibrates at a high frequency, generating complex #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples that solidify into crystalline structures in mid-air. The surrounding void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic particles and #FFD700 gold light trails reacting to the sonic rhythm. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, intricate UI elements manifesting from the sound, 8k resolution, immersive atmosphere.
